Why QueSnack

Your cravings,
delivered.

We're a delivery-first kitchen in Dr. A. S. Rao Nagar — Mexican-style fast food, indulgent waffles and quick, reliable service, straight from our griddle to your door.

  • Fresh preparation on every order — never pre-made
  • Eggless waffle & pancake options
  • Satisfying portions at friendly prices — about ₹500 for two
  • Rated 4.1 by customers on Swiggy
